chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1730 of 2016 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 25-03-2025 Mr. Zohaib Ahmed, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa, advocate for the respondent department. Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Assistant Attorney General. Petition is pending since 2016 without any progress. Even today brief is being held for Petitioner’s counsel and adjournment is being sought. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
